summary: Planning Board Sub-tabs Feature - FULLY VERIFIED. All 3 sub-tabs (New Projects, Current Projects, Delivered Projects) working correctly. Backend APIs for filtering by planning_status and date filters all passing. Frontend UI shows correct sub-tabs with appropriate action buttons: 'Ready to Construction' in New Projects, 'Mark as Delivered' in Current Projects. Full workflow tested: project moved from New -> Current -> Delivered successfully.

test_credentials.Planning: Demo Access -> Quick Access -> 'Planning' button (Suresh Iyer - planning@constructionos.com)

seed_data_creation: Test moved project proj_5facc3a0f668 through workflow (new -> active -> delivered) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Planning Board sub-tabs feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/planning/projects-filtered?planning_status=new|active|delivered with optional date filters (date_from, date_to, month, year). PATCH /api/planning/projects/{id}/planning-status to change status. Frontend: PlanningBoard.jsx has 3 sub-tabs under All Projects. Key data-testids: subtab-new, subtab-active, subtab-delivered, date-filter-type, date-filter-date, date-filter-from, date-filter-to, date-filter-year, apply-date-filter, clear-date-filter, ready-to-construction-{id}, mark-delivered-{id}, project-row-{id}, project-search.

Sub-tabs Visible.details: All 3 sub-tabs visible: New Projects, Current Projects, Delivered Projects

New Projects Tab.details: Shows projects with planning_status='new' or null. Each row has 'Ready to Construction' button

Current Projects Tab.details: Shows projects with planning_status='active'. Each row has 'Mark as Delivered' button

Delivered Projects Tab.details: Shows projects with planning_status='delivered'. No action buttons (completed state)

Ready to Construction Button.details: Clicking moves project from New to Current Projects, shows success toast 'Moved to Current Projects'

Mark as Delivered Button.details: Clicking moves project from Current to Delivered Projects, shows success toast 'Marked as Delivered'

Date Filter Dropdown.details: Dropdown with options: All Time, By Date, Date Range, By Month, By Year

Apply/Clear Filter Buttons.details: Apply and Clear buttons appear when filter type is not 'All Time'

Backend GET /api/planning/projects-filte.details: Returns list of projects with planning_status='new' or null
Returns list of projects with planning_status='active'
Returns list of projects with planning_status='delivered'

Date Filter - By Year.details: Filtering by year parameter works correctly

Date Filter - By Month/Year.details: Filtering by month and year parameters works correctly

Date Filter - Date Range.details: Filtering by date_from and date_to parameters works correctly
